at://did:plc:fpruhuo22xkm5o7ttr2ktxdo/sh.title: Valid TIDs are incorrectly rejected
at://did:plc:fpruhuo22xkm5o7ttr2ktxdo/sh.body_excerpt: `3m3zm7eurxk26` is a valid TID but is incorrectly rejected. This is because the formatter validates using Crockford's base32 but that's not the format atproto is using. See https://atproto.com/specs/tid#tid-syntax for details and https://tangled.org/@slices.network/slices/pulls/…
